name: Frameze theme system
description: The paper/ink/glass vocabulary used across Frameze components and marketing site copy. Not every component uses all three — check each component's designTokens field.

paper.description: Light theme. Warm off-white background, near-black text.

ink.description: The dark/foreground color token itself — used as the accent/text color in light mode, and as the background in dark mode contexts (naming follows the Frameze site's own --ink-rgb / --paper-rgb CSS variable pair, which swap under [data-theme="dark"]).

glass.description: Dark theme with frosted/blurred surfaces. Near-black background, translucent white panels with backdrop-blur.

motion.note: Used for nearly all transitions/animations across Frameze components and the marketing site — a smooth ease-out with no overshoot.
